examples: Have you got a whatchamacallit? You know... a screwdriver?
Have you ever used a hammer and screwdriver to loosen a nut from a bolt?
Don't go your entire life as a "hammer" doing the job of a "screwdriver".
It had a hole in it that had clearly been created by a screwdriver.
When he returns the screwdriver, it's been upgraded again: now it's a power screwdriver.
